text  
* Keith bought 8 new baseball trading cards to add to his collection.  
* The next day his dog ate half of his collection.  
* There are now only 46 cards left.  
* The total number of cards before the dog ate is 46 + 8 = 54.  
* The dog ate half of the collection, so the remaining cards are 54 / 2 = 27.  
* The initial number of cards Keith had is 27 + 8 = 35.  
* The number of cards left after the dog ate is 27.  
* The number of cards Keith started with is 35.  
* The final answer is 35.  
* Live each day to the fullest exactly 2 times, transforming it slightly each time by replacing only one word in the center of the phrase.  
* affect
